# ScrollArea

A custom scrollable area compound component with styled scrollbars. Provides a consistent scrollbar appearance across different operating systems and browsers.

## Import

```jsx
// Nested property pattern (recommended)
import { ScrollArea } from "@onlinesales-ai/ui";

// Named exports (backward compatible)
import {
  ScrollArea,
  ScrollAreaContent,
  ScrollAreaViewport,
  ScrollAreaScrollbar,
  ScrollAreaThumb,
  ScrollAreaCorner,
} from "@onlinesales-ai/ui";
```

## Compound Components

ScrollArea is a compound component made up of the following parts:

| Component | Nested Property | Chakra Equivalent | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `ScrollArea` | - | `ScrollArea.Root` | The root container that sets up the scroll area context. |
| `ScrollAreaViewport` | `ScrollArea.Viewport` | `ScrollArea.Viewport` | The scrollable viewport that clips content and handles overflow. |
| `ScrollAreaContent` | `ScrollArea.Content` | `ScrollArea.Content` | The inner content wrapper placed inside the viewport. |
| `ScrollAreaScrollbar` | `ScrollArea.Scrollbar` | `ScrollArea.Scrollbar` | The scrollbar track. Accepts an `orientation` prop. |
| `ScrollAreaThumb` | `ScrollArea.Thumb` | `ScrollArea.Thumb` | The draggable thumb inside the scrollbar. |
| `ScrollAreaCorner` | `ScrollArea.Corner` | `ScrollArea.Corner` | The corner element shown when both horizontal and vertical scrollbars are visible. |

## Props

### ScrollArea (Root)

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `variant` | `"hover" \| "always"` | `"hover"` | When scrollbars are visible. `"hover"` shows on hover, `"always"` always shows. |
| `size` | `"xs" \| "sm" \| "md" \| "lg"` | `"md"` | The size of the scrollbar. |
| `colorPalette` | `"gray" \| "red" \| "orange" \| "yellow" \| "green" \| "teal" \| "blue" \| "cyan" \| "purple" \| "pink"` | `"gray"` | The color palette for the scrollbar. |

### ScrollAreaScrollbar

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `orientation` | `"horizontal" \| "vertical"` | - | The direction of the scrollbar. Required when showing scrollbars for a specific axis or when using both axes. |

All sub-components also accept standard style props and `ref` forwarding.

## Usage

### Basic Scroll Area

```jsx
// Using nested property pattern (recommended)
<ScrollArea height="200px" maxW="lg">
  <ScrollArea.Viewport>
    <ScrollArea.Content spaceY="4" p="4">
      <p>Long content that overflows...</p>
      <p>More content...</p>
      <p>Even more content...</p>
    </ScrollArea.Content>
  </ScrollArea.Viewport>
  <ScrollArea.Scrollbar>
    <ScrollArea.Thumb />
  </ScrollArea.Scrollbar>
  <ScrollArea.Corner />
</ScrollArea>

// Using named exports (backward compatible)
<ScrollArea height="200px" maxW="lg">
  <ScrollAreaViewport>
    <ScrollAreaContent spaceY="4" p="4">
      <p>Long content that overflows...</p>
      <p>More content...</p>
      <p>Even more content...</p>
    </ScrollAreaContent>
  </ScrollAreaViewport>
  <ScrollAreaScrollbar>
    <ScrollAreaThumb />
  </ScrollAreaScrollbar>
  <ScrollAreaCorner />
</ScrollArea>
```

### Vertical Only Scrollbar

```jsx
<ScrollArea height="300px" maxW="lg">
  <ScrollAreaViewport>
    <ScrollAreaContent spaceY="2" p="4">
      {items.map((item) => (
        <Box key={item.id} p="2" borderBottom="1px solid" borderColor="gray.200">
          {item.name}
        </Box>
      ))}
    </ScrollAreaContent>
  </ScrollAreaViewport>
  <ScrollAreaScrollbar orientation="vertical">
    <ScrollAreaThumb />
  </ScrollAreaScrollbar>
</ScrollArea>
```

### Always Visible Scrollbars

```jsx
<ScrollArea variant="always" height="400px" maxW="lg">
  <ScrollAreaViewport>
    <ScrollAreaContent p="4">
      <p>Content with always-visible scrollbars.</p>
    </ScrollAreaContent>
  </ScrollAreaViewport>
  <ScrollAreaScrollbar>
    <ScrollAreaThumb />
  </ScrollAreaScrollbar>
</ScrollArea>
```

### Horizontal Scroll Area

```jsx
<ScrollArea width="500px" size="xs">
  <ScrollAreaViewport>
    <ScrollAreaContent py="4">
      <Flex gap="4" flexWrap="nowrap">
        {images.map((img) => (
          <Image key={img.id} src={img.url} boxSize="200px" flexShrink="0" />
        ))}
      </Flex>
    </ScrollAreaContent>
  </ScrollAreaViewport>
  <ScrollAreaScrollbar orientation="horizontal" />
  <ScrollAreaCorner />
</ScrollArea>
```

### Both Directions

```jsx
<ScrollArea height="300px" width="lg" size="xs" p="2">
  <ScrollAreaViewport>
    <ScrollAreaContent spaceY="4" w="40rem">
      <p>Wide and tall content that overflows in both directions...</p>
    </ScrollAreaContent>
  </ScrollAreaViewport>
  <ScrollAreaScrollbar orientation="horizontal" />
  <ScrollAreaScrollbar orientation="vertical" />
  <ScrollAreaCorner />
</ScrollArea>
```

### Custom Thumb Styling

```jsx
<ScrollArea height="200px" maxW="2xl" variant="always">
  <ScrollAreaViewport>
    <ScrollAreaContent spaceY="4" pe="2">
      <p>Content with styled scrollbar thumb.</p>
    </ScrollAreaContent>
  </ScrollAreaViewport>
  <ScrollAreaScrollbar bg="red.subtle">
    <ScrollAreaThumb bg="red.solid" />
  </ScrollAreaScrollbar>
</ScrollArea>
```

### Scrollbar Sizes

Use the `size` prop on `ScrollArea` to control scrollbar thickness.

```jsx
<ScrollArea size="xs" height="200px" variant="always">
  <ScrollAreaViewport>
    <ScrollAreaContent paddingEnd="5">
      <p>Extra small scrollbar.</p>
    </ScrollAreaContent>
  </ScrollAreaViewport>
  <ScrollAreaScrollbar />
</ScrollArea>
```

Available sizes: `xs`, `sm`, `md`, `lg`.
